title: Boston man charged with attacking, gouging MBTA officer’s eyes during booking process
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Crime The injured officer suffered severe bruising and burst blood vessels to both eyes.
A Boston man is facing multiple charges after authorities say he attacked an MBTA police officer and gouged his eyes during a violent struggle at transit police headquarters last week.

Fritznel Jean, 28, pleaded not guilty in Roxbury Municipal Court to charges of assault and battery on a police officer causing serious bodily injury, two counts of assault and battery on a police officer, and mayhem, court records show.

title: Philadelphia fans chant ‘We want Boston’ ahead of playoff series vs. Celtics

bullets: Morning Sports Update Game 1 between Boston and Philadelphia gets underway on Sunday at TD Garden.
Philadelphia 76ers' Vj Edgecombe after scoring during the NBA play-in tournament win against the Magic.

title: 4-year-old survives 7-story fall from Worcester apartment building
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Local News The incident happened Wednesday evening.
